did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review discussing the role of mobile teledermoscopy in skin cancer triage. While it mentions that some mobile applications use artificial intelligence for lesion evaluation and cites studies on AI accuracy, the paper itself does not employ AI, machine learning, or computational modeling to generate its own results or conclusions. It synthesizes existing literature on teledermoscopy and AI rather than conducting an AI-based experiment.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
